_doc: Venue knowledge for travel math (static matrix v1). Minutes are hand-entered estimates; promote stable facts to the wiki when proven.

venues.name: 200 Medical Plaza
venues.parking: Patient drop-off/pick-up loop off Westwood Plaza for pickups; 200 Medical Plaza structure adjacent if parking — allow 10-15 min for parking + walk.

venues.name: UCLA TDG office
venues.parking: UNVERIFIED — confirm building parking with Joel.

venues.name: UCLA West Medical Building
venues.source: Verified 2026-06-19 from UCLA Health location page; UCLA parking PDF confirms West Medical at 1010 Veteran Ave and Structure 32 parking.
venues.parking: Use UCLA Parking Structure 32 near Kinross/Gayley/Veteran; allow 10 min for parking and building walk.

venues.name: 805 Tiverton Ave
venues.source: Joel-provided 2026-06-20 for Wednesday David K face-to-face meetings.
venues.parking: UCLA/Westwood parking or drop-off near Tiverton; allow 10 min for parking and building walk.

venues.name: Ministry of Coffee Westwood
venues.source: Verified 2026-06-19 from Ministry of Coffee / Toast Westwood listing.
venues.parking: Westwood street or lot parking; from UCLA TDG office, allow time for a short walk/drive plus ordering buffer.

venues.name: Karen and Bob's (cousin)
venues.source: Joel-verified 2026-06-12 (Evite scrape was WRONG - design-canvas artifact said Burbank)
venues.parking: The Strand has no parking; street parking uphill or lots on Hermosa Ave - allow 10 min walk.

venues.name: Manhattan Country Club
venues.source: Verified from Bay Club/Waze after 2026-06-18 invite supplied wrong 1330 Manhattan Ave address.
venues.parking: Verified address is 1330 Parkview Avenue, not 1330 Manhattan Ave. Allow 10 min for arrival, parking, and clubhouse walk.

venues.name: LAX airport
venues.parking: Use arrivals loop for pickups; cell phone waiting lot if early.
